final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original digital illustration of a 赛博朋克 futuristic city nightscape (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "赛博朋克" aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include towering skyscrapers filling the frame, flying cars weaving between buildings, and ground-level puddles in the foreground reflecting neon lights
Subject: must include:
  - dense futuristic skyline with 高楼林立
  - multiple flying cars in motion through the cityscape
  - acid rain falling from the sky
  - ground-level water puddles with neon light reflections
Scene/backdrop: must include a futuristic city at night with acid rain atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a 科技感 and 颓废 atmosphere — exact light source mix and neon flicker treatment are yours
Color palette: must be blue-purple (蓝紫) dominant with neon accent lighting
Materials/textures: needs a wet, reflective surface treatment for ground and a hazy rain-diffused atmosphere — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
